seo.title: Binance ADA/USDT Funding Rate — 6,738 Settlements Analyzed | Zirodelta
seo.description: ADA/USDT funding rate on Binance: 14.51% annualized across 6,738 settlements (Jan 2020–Mar 2026). 81.7% positive rate frequency. Real data from 9.4M+ records.

content.intro: ADA/USDT perpetual futures on Binance — analyzed across 6,738 funding rate settlements spanning Jan 2020 to March 2026 (6.2 years of data). Average funding rate: +0.0132% per 8-hour settlement = 14.51% annualized. 81.7% of settlements are positive (shorts collect). All numbers from Zirodelta's 9.4M+ settlement record dataset — the deepest funding rate analysis available.
content.how_funding_works: Binance calculates funding rates using the Premium Index, comparing ADA perpetual prices to spot prices across multiple exchanges. The funding rate is determined by the 8-hour time-weighted average premium, with a base rate of 0.01% and a maximum rate of ±0.75%. When ADA perpetuals trade above spot prices, long positions pay funding to short positions, and vice versa. Settlement occurs precisely at funding times, with positions held during the timestamp subject to payment or collection.
content.why_this_pair: ADA/USDT benefits from Cardano's status as a major Layer 1 blockchain with consistent institutional interest and retail participation. The pair typically exhibits moderate volatility with predictable funding patterns during network upgrades or staking events. Large trading volume on Binance ensures minimal slippage for arbitrage entry and exit positions.

sections.heading: Historical Data (6,738 Settlements)
sections.body: Our dataset contains 6,738 ADA/USDT settlements on Binance over 6.2 years. Average rate: +0.0132% per 8h (14.51% annualized). 81.7% of settlements are positive — meaning a delta-neutral short position collects funding roughly 5 out of every 7 settlement periods. Range spans from the Binance funding rate floor to ceiling, capturing multiple market cycles including bull runs, corrections, and sideways periods.

sections.heading: Monthly Trends & Seasonality
sections.body: ADA shows steady positive funding with occasional spikes during Cardano ecosystem events. The 81.7% positive rate is remarkably consistent across exchanges.

sections.heading: Cross-Exchange Comparison: ADA Across Venues
sections.body: KuCoin leads ADA at 22.25% annualized (5,914 settlements). Binance and Bybit are nearly identical at 14.51% and 14.46% respectively. Hyperliquid at 11.16% (20,982 settlements).

sections.heading: Delta-Neutral Strategy Application
sections.body: Buy ADA spot + short ADA perpetual = zero price exposure. Collect funding every 8 hours when positive (81.7% of the time on Binance). Zirodelta's engine automates this with smart venue routing — if Binance rates compress, it checks alternative exchanges for better rates. Cross-exchange routing (e.g., short perp on Binance, buy spot on another exchange) unlocks opportunities that single-exchange strategies miss.

faq.question: What is the average ADA/USDT funding rate on Binance?
faq.answer: Based on 6,738 settlements from Jan 2020 to March 2026, the average is +0.0132% per 8h cycle (14.51% annualized). 81.7% of settlements are positive.

faq.question: Which exchange has the best ADA funding rate for arbitrage?
faq.answer: KuCoin leads ADA at 22.25% annualized (5,914 settlements). Binance and Bybit are nearly identical at 14.51% and 14.46% respectively. Hyperliquid at 11.16% (20,982 settlements).

faq.question: How reliable is ADA/USDT funding rate income on Binance?
faq.answer: 81.7% of 6,738 settlements over 6.2 years were positive. This includes multiple bear markets, making ADA/USDT on Binance one of the more consistent funding pairs. However, rates can turn negative during severe corrections.
